name: Red Centre Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Crushed dried red chiles, sun-dried
1 teaspoon Fresh ginger root, finely grated
1 pound Kangaroo meat or lean ground beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the garlic, crushed dried red chiles, chopped cilantro, grated ginger, sun-dried tomato mixture, salt, and breadcrumbs in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Pinch off egg-sized pieces of meat and flatten them between your palms.
3. Place a small amount of chili mixture in the center of each flattened piece of meat.
4. Roll up the meat carefully to enclose the filling, shaping it into neat balls.
5. Repeat until all the meat and filling are used.
6. Heat a large heavy frying pan over moderately high heat.
7. Fry the meatballs, turning constantly, until browned and cooked through.
8. Serve with steamed rice or cooked noodles, or accompany with a salad.
